name: @brevyn/community-desktop
description: Brevyn Community local-first desktop workspace for courses, RAG, and agent workflows.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c blue,green "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:native && npm run build:preview-assets && npm run build:libreoffice-runtime && npm run build:main && npm run build:indexing-worker && npm run build:preload && npm run build:skills && wait-on tcp:5174 && electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:preview-assets && npm run build:libreoffice-runtime && npm run build:main && npm run build:indexing-worker && npm run build:preload && npm run build:skills && npm run build:renderer
scripts.test:indexing-parser: npm run build:preview-assets && npm run build:indexing-worker && esbuild src/main/indexing/indexing-parser.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/indexing-parser.test.cjs && node dist/indexing-parser.test.cjs
scripts.test:protocols: esbuild src/main/protocols/openai-responses-anthropic/adapter.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/openai-responses-anthropic-adapter.test.cjs && node dist/openai-responses-anthropic-adapter.test.cjs && esbuild src/main/protocols/openai-responses-anthropic/stream.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/openai-responses-anthropic-stream.test.cjs && node dist/openai-responses-anthropic-stream.test.cjs && esbuild src/main/providers/openai-responses-agent-adapter.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/openai-responses-agent-adapter.test.cjs && node dist/openai-responses-agent-adapter.test.cjs && esbuild src/main/providers/openai-embedding-adapter.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/openai-embedding-adapter.test.cjs && node dist/openai-embedding-adapter.test.cjs && esbuild src/main/agent/local-anthropic-gateway.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/local-anthropic-gateway.test.cjs && node dist/local-anthropic-gateway.test.cjs && esbuild src/main/agent/agent-gateway-service.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/agent-gateway-service.test.cjs && node dist/agent-gateway-service.test.cjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:semester-weeks && npm run test:embedding-fingerprint && npm run test:context-anchor && npm run test:course-task-info && npm run test:file-path-chip && npm run test:workbook-preview && npm run test:skill-lock && npm run test:skill-sync && npm run test:libreoffice-runtime && npm run test:document-parse && npm run test:agent-timeline && npm run test:indexing-parser && npm run test:protocols && npm run test:storage && npm run test:rag-search
scripts.verify:python: python3 -m compileall -q default-skills/_shared/office default-skills/docx/scripts default-skills/pptx/scripts default-skills/xlsx/scripts
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run check:skills && npm run verify:python && npm run test:all && npm run build

author: Brevyn
